## Summary

Describe the change and the management workflow or safety problem it solves.

## Type Of Change

- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Workflow/prompt/schema/example
- [ ] Script or validation
- [ ] Safety/compliance
- [ ] Other

## Safety Checklist

- [ ] I did not include secrets, tokens, credentials, or `.env` files.
- [ ] I did not include raw company, customer, email, chat, ticket, or document exports.
- [ ] New or changed workflows remain read-only first.
- [ ] External writes and memory writes remain approval-gated.
- [ ] Any connector-specific content is generic and optional.

## Validation

- [ ] I ran `scripts/validate_repo_hygiene.py`.
- [ ] I compiled or manually tested changed scripts, if relevant.
- [ ] I updated examples, schemas, or workflow manifests where needed.

## Notes

Add any review notes or follow-up work here.
